summary: The diff implements the required fix for REQ-1. The AdminPanel.tsx has been updated to: show a loading spinner while identity/actor is initializing, prompt unauthenticated users to log in instead of showing access denied, and render admin content for authenticated users. The useQueries.ts hook was updated so useIsCallerAdmin only runs with a real (non-anonymous) identity. The App.tsx blocks route rendering until identity is fully restored. All immutable files were not modified. The requirements appear to be substantially addressed, though the diff is truncated so full verification of non-admin user handling is partially inferred from the file summary.
